refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model to analyze mission context and extract performance metrics
Database schema and storage system for recording requirements and traceability
Version control and update management system for baselines and calibration history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining mission context analysis algorithms, a traceable requirements database, and update management tools

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithms and database schema
Update management depends on accurate recording and traceability
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not tightly integrated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data for performance derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management across distributed components

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the entire performance requirement function; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has minimal containment; would cause high diffusion if assigned here.
Not relevant for performance requirement derivation; high diffusion risk.
Safety Services unrelated to performance requirement derivation; high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to NGHE Solution module centralizes performance requirement functions, minimizing diffusion and maximizing containment.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module if other unrelated functions are added
Interface dependency on Telemetry and Network Link must be well managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity; consider splitting if performance requirement management grows beyond scope.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and update management.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized assignment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: High containment score supports architectural clarity and ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Ensure interface definitions with Telemetry and Network Link are stable and well documented.
Plan for potential modularization if NGHE Solution module scope expands.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and architectural clarity. No further decomposition needed at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Current level is sufficiently decomposed and assigned; no revision required.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integration complexity
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Interface stability with Telemetry and Network Link
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability and update management in NGHE Solution
